0.text: Scarring in the left upper lobe apicoposterior segment

1.text: Scarring in the superior and basal segments of the left lower lobe

2.text: Tree-in-bud appearances in the lower lobes of both lungs

3.text: Focal consolidations in the basal segments of both lower lobes, more prominent on the left

4.text: Minimal ground glass opacities in the upper lobes of both lungs

5.text: Nodular densities smaller than 5 mm in the right middle lobe

6.text: Nodular densities smaller than 5 mm in the laterobasal segment of the left lower lobe
